field.label: Listen Interfaces
field.help: Interfaces to listen on for DNS queries. Leave empty to listen on all interfaces (0.0.0.0).

field.label: Port
field.help: The TCP/UDP port used for responding to DNS queries.

field.label: Anonymize Client IP
field.help: Anonymize client IP addresses in logs and statistics.

field.label: Rate Limit
field.help: Maximum number of requests per second from a single client. Set to 0 to disable.

field.label: Rate Limit Subnet Length (IPv4)
field.help: Subnet prefix length used for rate limiting IPv4 clients.

field.label: Rate Limit Subnet Length (IPv6)
field.help: Subnet prefix length used for rate limiting IPv6 clients.

field.label: Rate Limiting Allowlist
field.help: IP addresses excluded from rate limiting. Type an address and press Enter to add.

field.label: Refuse ANY Requests
field.help: Refuse resolving DNS queries of type ANY.

field.label: Enable EDNS Client Subnet
field.help: Enable EDNS Client Subnet (ECS) extension. Adds client subnet information to DNS queries sent to upstream servers.

field.label: EDNS Custom IP
field.help: Custom IP address to use for EDNS Client Subnet. Only used when EDNS Client Subnet is enabled.

field.label: Enable DNSSEC
field.help: Enable DNSSEC validation of DNS responses.

field.label: Disable Resolving of IPv6 Addresses
field.help: Disable resolving of IPv6 (AAAA) addresses. All AAAA queries will return an empty answer.

field.label: Blocking Mode
field.help: How blocked DNS responses are returned to clients.

field.label: Blocking IPv4
field.help: Custom IPv4 address to return for blocked queries. Only used when Blocking Mode is set to Custom IP.

field.label: Blocking IPv6
field.help: Custom IPv6 address to return for blocked queries. Only used when Blocking Mode is set to Custom IP.

field.label: Blocked Response TTL
field.help: TTL in seconds for blocked DNS responses.

field.label: Upstream Mode
field.help: How to query upstream DNS servers.

field.label: Upstream DNS Servers
field.help: Upstream DNS server addresses.

field.label: Upstream Timeout
field.help: Timeout for upstream DNS requests in seconds.

field.label: Bootstrap DNS Servers
field.help: DNS servers used to resolve upstream DoH/DoT hostnames.

field.label: Fallback DNS Servers
field.help: Fallback DNS servers used when upstream servers are unavailable.

field.label: Private Reverse DNS Servers
field.help: DNS servers used for reverse DNS resolution of private IP addresses. Type an address and press Enter to add.

field.label: Use Private Reverse DNS Resolvers
field.help: Use private reverse DNS resolvers to resolve PTR queries for private IP ranges.

field.label: Enable Reverse Resolving of Clients' IP Addresses
field.help: Resolve client IP addresses to hostnames using reverse DNS.
